command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
# Find the background worker entry point
grep -n '__background\|background_governed\|if __name__\|__main__\|_active_background\|_worker_alive\|worker_pid' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py | head -30
echo '=WORKER_ENTRY='
tail -200 runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
echo '=PAC_TICK_FUNC='
grep -n 'def ' runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py
ENDSSH
